languages.original_text: "Oh, wisest of men, I'd never dare ask for more! Please convey my infinite gratitude to your companion. I can't wait to hear the stories behind these items, especially where you acquired them and their market value."

languages.text: "Ох, мудрейший, о большем я бы не смела просить! Передайте мою бесконечную признательность своему спутнику. Мне не терпится услышать истории об этих вещицах, особенно о том, где вы их раздобыли и какую ценность они представляют".

"Oh, wisest of men, I'd never dare ask for more! Please convey my infinite gratitude to your companion. I can't wait to hear the stories behind these items, especially where you acquired them and their market value."
languages.original_text: "Ох, мудрейший, о большем я бы не смела просить! Передайте мою бесконечную признательность своему спутнику. Мне не терпится услышать истории об этих вещицах, особенно о том, где вы их раздобыли и какую ценность они представляют".

traits.locale_text: "Oh, wisest of men, I'd never dare ask for more! Please convey my infinite gratitude to your companion. I can't wait to hear the stories behind these items, especially where you acquired them and their market value."

"Oh, wisest of men, I'd never dare ask for more! Please convey my infinite gratitude to your companion. I can't wait to hear the stories behind these items, especially where you acquired them and their market value."

"Oh, wisest of men, I'd never dare ask for more! Please convey my infinite gratitude to your companion. I can't wait to hear the stories behind these items, especially where you acquired them and their market value."

languages.text: «Oh, sabio entre los sabios, ¡no me atrevería a pedir más! Transmita a su compañero mi infinito agradecimiento. Ardo en deseos de escuchar las historias de estos objetos, especialmente su origen y su valor en el mercado».
languages.original_text: "Oh, wisest of men, I'd never dare ask for more! Please convey my infinite gratitude to your companion. I can't wait to hear the stories behind these items, especially where you acquired them and their market value."

traits.locale_text: «Oh, sabio entre los sabios, ¡no me atrevería a pedir más! Transmita a su compañero mi infinito agradecimiento. Ardo en deseos de escuchar las historias de estos objetos, especialmente su origen y su valor en el mercado».

languages.text: 「おお、世にも賢きお方よ、これ以上を望むなどとんでもない！ どうかお連れの方に、アタシの尽きせぬ感謝をお伝えくださいまし。これらの品々にまつわる話を伺うのが待ちきれませんわ――とりわけ、どこで手に入れられたのか、そして市場価値のほどを」
languages.original_text: "Oh, wisest of men, I'd never dare ask for more! Please convey my infinite gratitude to your companion. I can't wait to hear the stories behind these items, especially where you acquired them and their market value."

traits.locale_text: 「おお、世にも賢きお方よ、これ以上を望むなどとんでもない！ どうかお連れの方に、アタシの尽きせぬ感謝をお伝えくださいまし。これらの品々にまつわる話を伺うのが待ちきれませんわ――とりわけ、どこで手に入れられたのか、そして市場価値のほどを」

languages.text: “噢，世间最睿智之人，多谢你们的慷慨！请向你的同伴转达我无尽的感激之情。我等不及想听这些物品背后的故事了，尤其是它们的出处，以及市价。”
languages.original_text: "Oh, wisest of men, I'd never dare ask for more! Please convey my infinite gratitude to your companion. I can't wait to hear the stories behind these items, especially where you acquired them and their market value."

traits.locale_text: “噢，世间最睿智之人，多谢你们的慷慨！请向你的同伴转达我无尽的感激之情。我等不及想听这些物品背后的故事了，尤其是它们的出处，以及市价。”

languages.text: "Oh, weisester aller Männer, mehr kann ich mir nicht wünschen! Bitte übermittelt Eurem Gefährten meine grenzenlose Dankbarkeit. Ich kann es kaum erwarten, die Geschichten dieser Objekte zu hören, insbesondere über ihre Herkunft und ihren Marktwert."
languages.original_text: "Oh, wisest of men, I'd never dare ask for more! Please convey my infinite gratitude to your companion. I can't wait to hear the stories behind these items, especially where you acquired them and their market value."

traits.locale_text: "Oh, weisester aller Männer, mehr kann ich mir nicht wünschen! Bitte übermittelt Eurem Gefährten meine grenzenlose Dankbarkeit. Ich kann es kaum erwarten, die Geschichten dieser Objekte zu hören, insbesondere über ihre Herkunft und ihren Marktwert."

languages.text: « Oh, sage parmi les sages, que demander de plus ! Veuillez faire part de ma gratitude infinie à votre compagnon. J'ai hâte d'entendre les récits qui accompagnent ces objets... En particulier, les détails concernant leur lieu de découverte et leur valeur sur le marché. »
languages.original_text: "Oh, wisest of men, I'd never dare ask for more! Please convey my infinite gratitude to your companion. I can't wait to hear the stories behind these items, especially where you acquired them and their market value."

traits.locale_text: « Oh, sage parmi les sages, que demander de plus ! Veuillez faire part de ma gratitude infinie à votre compagnon. J'ai hâte d'entendre les récits qui accompagnent ces objets... En particulier, les détails concernant leur lieu de découverte et leur valeur sur le marché. »

languages.text: "Ey bilge kimse, daha fazlasını istemeye asla cüret edemem! Lütfen yoldaşınıza sonsuz şükranlarımı iletin. Bu eşyaların arkasındaki hikâyeleri, özellikle de onları nereden aldığınızı ve piyasa değerlerini duymak için sabırsızlanıyorum."
languages.original_text: "Oh, wisest of men, I'd never dare ask for more! Please convey my infinite gratitude to your companion. I can't wait to hear the stories behind these items, especially where you acquired them and their market value."

traits.locale_text: "Ey bilge kimse, daha fazlasını istemeye asla cüret edemem! Lütfen yoldaşınıza sonsuz şükranlarımı iletin. Bu eşyaların arkasındaki hikâyeleri, özellikle de onları nereden aldığınızı ve piyasa değerlerini duymak için sabırsızlanıyorum."
